metadata.title: In the Arsenal — Your Strategic Hub for Flesh and Blood TCG
metadata.description: Decks, lore, expert analysis, and community tools for the Flesh and Blood trading card game.

about.heading: A hub built by players, for players.
about.description: In the Arsenal brings together expert content and powerful tools to sharpen your game. From deep meta analysis to streamlined deck building — everything you need to dominate the combat chain.

content.title: Expert Analysis
content.description: Deep dives into the meta, deck guides, tournament coverage, and lore curiosities from the world of Rathe. Stay ahead of the combat chain.

tools.title: Forge Your Deck
tools.description: Build, share, and manage your decklists or wishlist for trading and selling. Your arsenal, organized and ready for battle.

teaser.heading: Something powerful is being crafted.
teaser.description: We're building the tools and content that every Flesh and Blood player deserves. Stay tuned.

footer.trademark: Flesh and Blood is a trademark of Legend Story Studios.
